category_sources: Official BitlBee homepage says it brings IM to IRC clients.
source_facts.description says BitlBee is an IRC to other chat networks gateway.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bitlbee; official homepage uses BitlBee branding.
docs_sources: Official BitlBee user guide is hosted on bitlbee.org.
Official BitlBee wiki states it provides searchable BitlBee documentation.
repo_sources: Debian source metadata also points to github.com/bitlbee/bitlbee for upstream source.
Official BitlBee homepage states the main development repository moved to GitHub.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists XMPP/Jabber and other chat network integrations.
source_facts.description identifies an IRC gateway to other chat networks.
